tasks.title: Backup Monitoring - Track GitHub Sync
tasks.description: Create a widget that monitors when OpenClaw workspace was last backed up to GitHub. Show last sync time, next scheduled backup, and manual sync button.
tasks.executionResult: Task "Backup Monitoring - Track GitHub Sync" completed successfully. Executed: Create a widget that monitors when OpenClaw workspace was last backed up to GitHub. Show last sync time, next scheduled backup, and manual sync button.

tasks.title: Backup - Implement GitHub Sync Check API
tasks.description: Create /api/backup endpoint that checks git status, last commit time, and any uncommitted changes. Return sync health status.
tasks.executionResult: "Backup - Implement GitHub Sync Check API" done. Results saved to workspace memory.

tasks.title: Audit Trail - Link Execution History to Real Data
tasks.description: Wire the Execution History screen to use actual session_history() data instead of hardcoded mock. Show real task runs, models used, tokens burned, timing.
tasks.executionResult: Completed "Audit Trail - Link Execution History to Real Data". Action items resolved.

tasks.title: Audit Trail - Add Filters & Search
tasks.description: Add filtering by date range, model, task status, assignee. Add full-text search of execution logs. Pagination for large result sets.
tasks.executionResult: Task "Audit Trail - Add Filters & Search" completed successfully. Executed: Add filtering by date range, model, task status, assignee. Add full-text search of execution logs. Pagination for large result sets.

tasks.title: Situation Room - Agent Collaboration Visualizer
tasks.description: Create a new screen showing how agents work together. Visual diagram of task handoff chains, who's executing what, tools being used, resource allocation in real-time.

tasks.title: Situation Room - Real-time Task Flow Diagram
tasks.description: Build flowchart showing task chains: parent task → which agent → which tools/skills → sub-tasks → results. Update in real-time as execution happens.
tasks.executionResult: Completed "Situation Room - Real-time Task Flow Diagram". Action items resolved.

tasks.title: Documents - Full Inventory Scan
tasks.description: Scan entire OpenClaw workspace (recursive) for all .txt and .md files. Categorize by type (memory, config, docs, scripts, etc). Build catalog with descriptions.

tasks.title: Documents - Display Catalog in Dashboard
tasks.description: Wire Documents page to show real catalog from API. Make each doc card clickable to preview/open. Add search, filter by category, sort by date.

tasks.title: Memory System - Validate MEMORY.md Structure
tasks.description: Audit current MEMORY.md. Ensure it has strong system of record: clear sections, dated entries, actionable insights. Document best practices for update patterns.

tasks.title: Memory System - Link Memory Files to Dashboard
tasks.description: Wire Memory page to show actual MEMORY.md + daily memory files. Make sections clickable, add search, show cross-references between docs and tasks.

tasks.title: Models - Add Token Tracker Bars to Model Cards
tasks.description: Show token usage % per model with progress bar, cooldown timer when depleted, warning when >85% used. Display estimated refresh time.

tasks.title: Models - Performance Chart (Stacked Bar)
tasks.description: Create stacked bar chart showing % of compute/tokens used by each model over time (last hour, last 24h, last week). Identify which models are doing heavy lifting.

tasks.title: Models - Mode Toggles (Standard vs High Performance)
tasks.description: Add UI toggle for Standard mode (all local) vs High Performance (API models). Show cost difference. Persist selection. Document trade-offs.

tasks.title: Models - Historical Performance Trends
tasks.description: Track model performance metrics over time: token efficiency, cost per task, speed, accuracy. Show trend lines and anomalies. Identify performance regression.

tasks.title: System Performance - Resource Warning System
tasks.description: Add smart warnings when CPU >85%, RAM >90%, GPU >80%. Show estimated impact on agent capacity. Suggest model downgrades or pausing tasks.

tasks.title: System Performance - Historical Resource Tracking
tasks.description: Log system resource usage every minute. Build 24h, 7d, 30d history charts. Identify peak usage times, bottlenecks, and optimization opportunities.

tasks.title: System Performance - Performance Optimization Specs
tasks.description: Define performance SLOs: target CPU <50%, RAM <70%, model inference time <2s. Build automated recommendations when targets missed. Track compliance.

tasks.title: Dashboard - Integration Testing & Polish
tasks.description: End-to-end test all new features. Fix styling bugs, ensure responsive design, validate all APIs connected. Performance test with real data loads.

tasks.title: Architecture & Design: Remote Access Infrastructure
tasks.description: Design comprehensive architecture using Cloudflare + Vercel as complementary services. Map data flows, security boundaries, and integration points. Document what goes local vs cloud. Create architecture diagram.

tasks.title: Cloudflare Setup: Account & DNS Configuration
tasks.description: Create Cloudflare account or migrate existing domain. Configure DNS records. Set up security rules, rate limiting, and DDoS protection. Enable caching for static assets.

tasks.title: Cloudflare Tunnel: Local API Exposure
tasks.description: Install cloudflared daemon. Create tunnel for localhost:3000 (dev) and localhost:3001 (prod). Configure for auto-startup. Set up tunnel routing rules and health checks.

tasks.title: Cloudflare Workers: Edge Functions for Frontend
tasks.description: Set up Cloudflare Workers to cache/serve static frontend assets from edge. Reduce latency for UI. Route /api/* to Tunnel. Test worker behavior.

tasks.title: Cloudflare Security: WAF, Rate Limiting, Access Rules
tasks.description: Configure Cloudflare WAF rules. Set up rate limiting to protect APIs. Add IP allowlist for known work networks. Enable bot management. Test security rules.

tasks.title: Vercel Setup: Frontend Deployment & Auto-Deploy
tasks.description: Create Vercel project. Connect GitHub repo. Configure build settings. Set environment variables (API_URL → Cloudflare endpoint). Deploy to Vercel. Get preview & production URLs.

tasks.title: Vercel Edge Functions: API Proxy & Caching
tasks.description: Create Vercel Edge Functions to proxy API requests to Cloudflare Tunnel. Add response caching layer. Implement request deduplication. Test latency improvements.

tasks.title: DNS & Routing: Cloudflare + Vercel Integration
tasks.description: Configure DNS to route mission-control.yourdomain.com to Cloudflare. Set up Cloudflare rules to route /static → Vercel edge, /api → Tunnel. Test routing logic.

tasks.title: Testing: Performance & Latency
tasks.description: Load test from multiple locations (home, work, mobile). Measure API response times, frontend load times, and TTL. Identify bottlenecks. Optimize caching strategies.

tasks.title: Testing: Security & Access Control
tasks.description: Verify WAF rules block malicious traffic. Test rate limiting. Confirm IP allowlist works. Validate tunnel encryption. Check for information leakage. Penetration test basic scenarios.

tasks.title: Monitoring & Observability Setup
tasks.description: Set up Cloudflare Analytics. Add Vercel monitoring. Configure error tracking (Sentry). Set up uptime monitoring (Pingdom/UptimeRobot). Create dashboards. Configure alerts for failures.

tasks.title: Documentation: Architecture & Operations
tasks.description: Document full architecture, data flows, and component interactions. Write operational runbooks: startup, shutdown, troubleshooting, failover. Document security practices.

tasks.title: Disaster Recovery & Failover Planning
tasks.description: Plan failover scenarios: tunnel down, Vercel down, DNS failure. Document RTO/RPO. Set up redundancy where possible. Test failover procedures.

tasks.title: Cost Analysis & Optimization
tasks.description: Analyze Cloudflare (DNS, Tunnel, Workers) and Vercel costs. Identify optimization opportunities. Set up billing alerts. Document cost projections for 6/12 months.

tasks.title: User Acceptance Testing & Go-Live
tasks.description: Have bckaroo test from work for 2-4 weeks. Gather feedback on stability, performance, usability. Make final tweaks. Document known issues. Launch to production.
